question.content: Split the figure into stages and derive overall gain and equivalent resistances for the multi-stage amplifier. Output exactly one ASCII line with three semicolon-separated fields in the form Au:...;Ri:...;Ro:...; do not use '=' or any equation form, no Chinese characters, no prose sentence, and no extra text.

step_1.content: Method: signal-path tracing plus test-source method for R_i and R_o.
step_1.key_point: Use one forward gain channel and two independent port tests.

step_3.content: Trace only the incremental forward route from differential input to output emitter follower to define A_u.
step_3.key_point: Gain extraction is done by path tracing, not by upper/lower panel lookup.

step_5.content: Apply an input test source and read R_i from the symmetric two-branch current split at the entrance node.
step_5.key_point: Symmetry gives the input equivalent without reusing the panel-2 template.

step_7.content: Set v_i to zero, inject output test current, then map the β-controlled branch to R_o and keep the required token order.
step_7.key_point: Port test at output provides R_o directly in the target format.
